name: TrustArc Privacy Management Platform API
what_it_does: Privacy management platform with REST API — providing consent management (CMP), Data Subject Rights (DSR) automation, privacy assessments, vendor risk management, and cross-border data transfer management for enterprise privacy compliance programs, with GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PDPA, and 50+ global regulation support.
use_cases: Collecting and managing cookie consent on websites via TrustArc Consent Manager
Automating Data Subject Rights (DSR) intake and fulfillment via TrustArc API
Managing third-party vendor privacy assessments via TrustArc Vendor Risk Manager
Querying consent analytics and compliance metrics for privacy program reporting
Integrating TrustArc consent data with marketing platforms for consent-aware activation
not_for: Simple website cookie consent without enterprise privacy program needs (use Usercentrics)
Publisher-specific consent optimization (use Sourcepoint for publisher focus)
Small businesses without dedicated privacy team (enterprise pricing model)
best_when: An enterprise privacy team needs a comprehensive privacy management platform covering consent, DSR automation, vendor risk, and compliance program management — especially for multi-regulation compliance across 50+ global privacy laws.
avoid_when: You need only basic cookie consent, don't have enterprise privacy program complexity, or are a small-to-mid-size business without dedicated privacy operations.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. API key for service-to-service. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for DSR status changes and consent events. JavaScript SDK for web consent. Mobile SDK for iOS/Android. TCF2 CMP registration. Scoped by privacy module (consent, DSR, assessments, vendors). Enterprise SSO via SAML.

pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2001 (as TRUSTe). Rebranded to TrustArc 2018. Raised $70M+ total. Backed by Vista Equity Partners. Pioneer in web privacy — original TRUSTe seal was 2000s web trust mark. TCF2 certified. 1,000+ enterprise customers including AMEX, Netflix, Salesforce, Samsung. 50+ privacy regulation support is broadest in market. Consent Manager, DSR Manager, Privacy Risk Manager products. Gartner Magic Quadrant for Privacy Management Software.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for consent data, DSR, assessments, and vendor management. OAuth2 and API key auth. Good enterprise documentation. Multiple product modules (Consent Manager, DSR Manager) each with separate API. Webhook for DSR status changes. TCF2 vendor list management. Complex privacy program scope — detailed onboarding required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Consent reads fully idempotent. DSR reads idempotent by request ID. Assessment reads idempotent. DSR creation not idempotent — check by subject identifier before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Multiple product modules with separate APIs — consent, DSR, assessments each different
Vista Equity acquisition — pricing has increased significantly post-acquisition
50+ regulation support creates complex configuration — validate specific regulation requirements
DSR fulfillment automation requires integration with data systems beyond TrustArc
TCF2 consent and first-party consent are separate flows — configure both for full compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PDPA, PIPEDA, SOC2 compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise privacy platform handling legally sensitive data — implement strict access controls. DSR data contains verified consumer identity — secure storage and transmission required. Consent records are legal evidence — immutable audit logging mandatory. Cross-border data transfer management requires documentation of transfer mechanisms.
